entry.title: Re: Consume a Parameterized View from External OData v2 s...
entry.content: If you find any annotation in the imported file is not convenient, you can manually edit the imported file and change it or override these in your projection. I did not directly map the external service to the provided service. Instead I defined a new entitiy with parameters without persistence and took full control of the definition.

entry.title: Re: Item 000010: No sales quantity is saved for item ?
entry.content: Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: Hi Jerry, I am not talking about the fields in side the CDS Views. I am looking for the information Created By and Date of that particular CDS itself. Its like in DD02L we have metadata information right for any Table or View (Tabname, View type etc.,). Similar to that I wanted to find the name of the user and date of any CDS View or Table. Please let me know if I am not clear.

entry.title: Dimension Hierarchy Drilldown
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have created a story which has date and account dimension. The account dimension has 1 level parent-child hierarchy. We expected that we would be able to select the drill option, so that all the leaf members of the account will be displayed at the same time.

However, it turns out that we cannot select the drill down option. SAC shows the following message when we tried to select the drilldown option.

Please advise, if this is intentional technical limitation, or if there is any way that we can solve this issue.

Thank you.

Bhumirapee A.

entry.title: Re: How to enter item that is used for promo
entry.content:
Hi,

Couple of ways to address the requirement.

1. Keep the sampling inventory in sampling warehouse to avoid other usage.

2. Record the consumption via a delivery challan by recording this to a separate GL Sales promotion kind of when the goods are delivered from sampling warehouse. If these are to be given on FOC basis then close the DC manually. 

Second option is to record the GI with a separate GL sales promotion kind of to bifurcate between issue entries.

Basis requirement you have narrated, have suggested the options.

Hope this will give you some starting point to think.

Regards

entry.title: How can we get a TADIR entry for any given object in S/4Hana Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All

Our requirement would be, we will get one object name and we are not sure about type of the object. In order to find out that information, we were looking if we can get TADIR like entry in public cloud would be helpful. Object also can be standard or custom. I think for custom objects there is a CDS View available. But we need for all objects. Appreciate if any one can help us.

Thanks,

Sreedhar R

entry.title: Re: AP contract report details
entry.content:
I think you created tow topics for the same question, your question already answered

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/vendor-turnover-report/qaq-p/13627707

Thanks

entry.title: Re: IBP - VBA - BEFORE_REFRESH() how to exit 'Process in...
entry.content: @vincentverheyen 'EndIf' for IBPAutomationObject check and assignment is not mentioned in any sample codes. I can understand that it is not inline with VBA syntax, yet I din't get any errors.

entry.title: Re: How to find out which button is clicked in the rule o...
entry.content:
Hi,

For Buttons inside ButtonTable Section, the rule in the OnPress of each button will probably get the SectionProxy which is the entire ButtonTable Section (which can contains multiple buttons). So you can only get the Section's Name. It'll work if they only have 1 button per Button Table Section, otherwise there's no easy way. 

We can of course look into enhancing this behavior. Please open a feature request for your requirement here.

entry.title: Re: SOAP protocol to Cloud Connector for "Replicate docum...
entry.content:
The 401 must be coming from the backend (ERP system). So the easiest way to find out the reason, is to increase the ICM trace (transaction SICM) and check why the logon fails.

Also you can check the definition of the URL (Service Node) you are calling, in transaction SICF. It will show you, whether it requires logon or not.

entry.title: Sync between one identity and SAP S/4 Hana system failing
entry.content:
Hi all,

Our SAP S4 systems are connected to myID (Quest's One Identity s/w).

myID is used to perform user management in SAP systems and there is a synch while runs between SAP and myID in all SAP systems.

The synch is trying to match the user status between myID and SAP systems.

Currently, the synch is failing with an error that BP with GUID xxxxxxxxxx does not exist (see below screenshot)
many thanks for any ideas.
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Behavior Extension - an example of developer extensibility
entry.content:
Hi p619793, thank you for sharing your knowledge. 

I have almost the same use case (system: S4HOP 2023 FPS0)

  • I am attempting to extend I_MaintenanceOrderTP which requires me to extend the behavior  R_MaintenanceOrderTP.
  • upon saving MaintenanceOrder, a custom event zz_OrderEvent should be raised. 

What I have done:

  • extended R_MaintenanceOrderTP with zr_maintenanceordertp_ext
  • created the BEHP zbp_r_maintenanceordertp_e

The issue I am facing:

  • in the local class of zbp_r_maintenanceordertp_e, only "METHODS cleanup_finalize REDEFINITION." 
  • since the behavior  R_MaintenanceOrderTP is unmanaged, I cannot add "methods save REDEFINITION" and will get error "The method "SAVE" cannot be redefined in accordance with BEHAVIOR definition "R_MAINTENANCEORDERTP". 

So my question is: where and how (upon save) should the event be raised? 

Thank you for any hint to solution.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Fund Management closing activities
entry.content: May i know what is the answer for question "Is there any table which give the change history for FMDERIVE transaction ..change history means old data and change by user.."

entry.title: Sync between one identity and SAP S/4 Hana system failing
entry.content:
Hi all,

Our SAP S4 systems are connected to myID (Quest's One Identity s/w).

myID is used to perform user management in SAP systems and there is a synch while runs between SAP and myID in all SAP systems.

The synch is trying to match the user status between myID and SAP systems.

Currently, the synch is failing with an error that BP with GUID xxxxxxxxxx does not exist (see below screenshot)
many thanks for any ideas. 
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Cancelling more than 1 Freight Unit from the Freight...
entry.content:
Hi Rogerio,

We noticed that a regular location was taken over. Not a onetime location. When I cancel the Freight Units one by one, the behavior does not occur. Only when multiple freight units are selected from the Freight Units Worklist I encounter this behavior.

regards,

Marcel

entry.title: SAP authorization check for tables in Se16, se16n, se11...
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Need your help with restricting views of specific tables in tcodes like se11, se16, se16n, etc. So we need some users to have access to tcodes e11, se16, se16n to all tables except PA0008, PA0014, PA0015, HRP1005. Authorization groups for this tables are PA and PC. I created test role for this tcodes and added S_TABU_DIS, but what I see, it only has 2 fields and it grants access to table groups, but this won't work for us, cause I can't make a list for all tables and groups for users and grant that access, I need to 'exclude' some tables.

Is there any possibility to restrict access to specific tables? 

Thanks in advance for your help.

Regards,

Tamuna

entry.title: Scc1 in public
entry.content:
Hello community!

 

In the public version, how do I transmit CR changes within the same server to the client? I want to transfer customization settings to the development client.

 

In the PCE version, it was transmitted as SCC1 t-code.

Thanks in advance.

 

huny

entry.title: Re: CreateSelectionParams not working as expected
entry.content:
Hi

Just created incident with same title as this post. Thank you!

entry.title: Deep Entity vs Changeset
entry.content:
Good day

We have a simple table in Fiori where the user can select a few rows and click on the post button, we are sending it as batch from the frontend and on the backend we need to post all the entries at once to a bapi. There is no nested structures, all entries are posted to one BAPI. We are using segw for the oData. For this scenario would it be better to use Deep Entity or ChangeSet? Currently we are using a create entity but it is calling the bapi for each row, we want to call the bapi with data from all rows selected

entry.title: SAP Enable Now shut down producer when editing recording
entry.content:
Hello,

When editing a simulation/recording in Producer, Producer is shutting down. We are facing this issue at our customer for all different authors (so no local problem). Any idea what the reason should be?

entry.title: Re: Enabling the Promote feature within SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear Jerome,

Thank you for the blog post. Since when is the TransportManagementService Destination required in more than one subaccount (source=DEV)? Is this a special requirement of SAP Build Process Automation? Until now, I only knew that the DEV subaccount points to CTMS and the CTMS subaccount has a destination in each target subaccount (here DEV, PRD). Thank you for the explanation

Best regards,

Sascha

entry.title: System.InvalidOperationException: b1s file is not found! error SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Trying to deploy the addon but it is showing error like System.InvalidOperationException: b1s file is not found!.

I have attached two snap for same. 

Do the needful please.

 

 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: Schedule line without external number does not exist...
entry.content:
@kumar8682 This error is due to the recent changes in the Master Data namely Tlane or Production Source. Error Code 182 is a generic one and can be dealt using 2 options. 

1) Send to R/3 --> To reconcile the order in APO with ECC. You may find queue error which you can resolve at /sapapo/cq tcode.

2) Delete in APO --> When we aren't able to Send to R/3 and you still don't have any queue error, then this option will be appropriate.

Best Regards,

'Riyaz'

entry.title: Script to a specific page - Sap analytic cloud
entry.content:
Hi
Appreciate your help
I created a button

i want that on click on that button it will transfer the user to a specific table that is on another page in the same story

Can you help me pls with the Script for that

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Check Printing with multiple printers
entry.content:
Yes it is possible, in SPAD - Spool Administration  you need to create output device with the following settings 

Host Spool Access Method: G: Front end printing with control tech
or 
Host Spool Access Method: L: Print Locally using LP/LPR

both options should work 

Host Printer: _DEFAULT

this will direct the SAP to the client local printer  not the printers on application server.

entry.title: SAP C4C How to deactivate actions in Gmail calendar
entry.content:
Hello,

We have set up server side integration in C4C and made some visit fields (standard and extension) mandatory. Gmail is used as an application.

Users are now creating visits from Gmail without opening the SAP Side pane in Gmail. From the google  calendar, they open an existing visit and use the button Other Actions and press : Copy to SAP Visits. A visit is created, but as in the visit screen, the SSI profile fields are not available, the visit is created with the fields that have been set to mandatory.

My question is, is there a standard way that actions in the drop down list can be hidden for all users or that the users individually can hide these actions in the Gmail calendar.

I checked some blogs, but i cannot find any 'standard' way to prevent users to create incomplete visits by copying them already like  SAP Cloud for Customer – Gmail Server-Side Integra... - SAP Community

I added a little prinscreen that shows the options i would like to hide.

Many thanks in advance

Kr.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere & SDI CDC: How to get SDI Change Data...
entry.content: Hi Rishav, you can try the Load Behavior in replication task.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Activate / Deactivate
entry.content:
Dear @JimmyYang ,

do you have any news in regards to API support for deactivating/activating of users? I have found several improvement requests on customer influenze, but they also involve some sort of automation. First off we simply need the ability to modify the value of the user property IS_USER_DEACTIVATED.

Best regards Anders

entry.title: Re: Open your SAP OData APIs for some swagger – or how to make friends with the other kids from the
entry.content:
Thank you so much @Martin-Pankraz  for your reply. 

It is a free trial APIM tenant, where i investigate the benefits of the platform and making some demos before enabling it in the corporate landscape. 

I created the certificates in our C4C tenant - communication arrangement for OData. I confirmed on parallel that certificates are working fine. I also uploaded SAP root certificates in APIM. 

1.Should i also upload the C4C tenant certificate? 

2.I also noticed the Note: "CA certificates for certificate validation are not supported in the Consumption tier." so i don't know if that attempt would ever work on that APIM tenant. 

Kind regards

Sokratis.

entry.title: Re: EWM SAP EWM configuration of the storage type for bul...
entry.content: Hello, the Error ist: Error occurred when searching for block storage control E1

entry.title: Terraform Provider for SAP BTP version 1.1.0 - what’s new
entry.content:
Say hello to release 1.1.0

Sticking to the promised monthly release cycle we published version 1.1.0 of the Terraform provider for SAP BTP yesterday.  Time to check what features have been added since version 1.0.0.

We did some work “under the hood” to improve cross-functional qualities of the provider. While this is an important part of the development and improves the overall quality of the provider, we of course want to provide new features especially when requested by the you. Let’s check them out!

The perfect stop to find out is the release notes in the GitHub repository:

Time to explore what is hidden behind these exciting new features, right?

Enabling of Features for Directories

With release 1.0.0 you could already create directories with and without enabling features. But what if you created a directory without enabled features like entitlements or authorizations and then you decide to change that? Let’s try it out, by first creating a simple directory without any features:

That worked:

Now we want to change this to a managed directory and enable the entitlements and authorizations feature. We adjust the Terraform configuration accordingly:

Applying this change with version 1.0.0 results in an error:

Release 1.1.0 to the rescue! After upgrading the provider to version 1.1.0 this change will be supported:

This is of course reflected in the directory on SAP BTP:

Especially when starting with the SAP BTP and being unsure on how to deal with features on directories your account setup this new feature can help you a lot.

Show Hierarchy of Global Account

The next feature we added is the option to display the hierarchy under a global account. Let us assume that you have a more complex setup with nested directories and subaccounts like this:

Up to now you could manage this hierarchies via the Terraform provider:

Up to now you could manage this hierarchies via the Terraform provider:

But what if you want to analyze the setup e.g., to check naming conventions in complex setups. Although there have been data sources for directories and subaccounts, you had to manually iterate through them, which can become cumbersome.

With release 1.1.0 we added a new data source called “btp_globalaccount_with_hierarchy” that returns you the complete hierarchy. Let us try that out:

This data source returns a nested structure displaying the nested setup we set up before:

That looks nice, but how can I make use of that complex structure? Did you know that you can access the Terraform output and transfer it into JSON which you can then use e.g., via jq? You can.

Let us execute the “terraform output” command, add the “-json” option and stream the output into a local JSON file:

The result is:

Just another data source at a first glance, but this can help you a lot when you must do the analysis of existing setups.

User Agent Configuration

The “old” Terraform SDK offered the option to provide additional information via the user agent header when calling the backend APIs. The new plugin framework that we use does not offer this feature (yet?). To close the gap, we added a custom parameter in release 1.1.0 that allows you to add such information to the header. You can use the “BTP_APPEND_USER_AGENT” environment variable to provide this information as described in the documentation:

One scenario that could make use of this is the usage of the Terraform provider for bridge implementations like Crossplane.

One more thing …

… not feature wise, but contributor wise. As you can see on the release note we have a lot of first-time contributors that provided these features to you:

Thanks a lot for improving the provider – keep up the great work!

How to update?

The update of the provider version is straightforward. Depending on your configuration in the provider, you must adjust the version constraint to 1.1.0 and execute a “terraform init -upgrade”.

That’s it.

All new resources are documented in the Terraform registry: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest

Feedback, questions, bugs, feature requests

Same procedure as before: if you want to interact with us, use the GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp:

  • To file a bug, please open an issue in the repository.

  • To file a feature request, please file it in the repository.

  • If you have a question, want to discuss ideas or do some “show & tell”, feel free to start a GitHub Discussion.

There are also some feature requests open that you can vote for. Check for the issues that are label as “enhancement” and “pending decision“ via this link https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement+label%3Apending-decision .

Your votes help us to prioritize our work.

What’s next?

Do you want a sneak peek what is coming next and when we plan to deliver a nee release? You find that information in the milestones on our GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/milestones

Be aware that plans and dates might change through the course of development.

With that … happy Terraforming!

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 4
Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: That did it, thank you, I can now load the UI5 resources from ui5.sap.com and I'm not getting any backend errors, thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: Attaching COVID Vaccine Card to Health and Vaccine Portlet
entry.content:
Hello @RinkyKarthik 

Thanks for the detailed explanation.

I'm using ADC to collect important documents for the new hire's job and their permanent employee record.

My client has requested that the documents/attachments collected during the Additional Data Collection step should appear in the employee's Profile.

In your solution, the employee uploads the attachments directly in the profile. 

Therefore, I am reaching out to find a solution or workaround to integrate attachments from the Additional Data Collection Step to an MDF Portlet in the Employee Profile. 

I would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter.

Best Regards,

Alexa

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

Thank you for your email and for the opportunity to participate in the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning. I am very interested in this program.
I believe that I am a good fit for the digital skills initiative, as I am a hard worker and I am willing to learn new things. I am also passionate about technology and I am eager to start my career in this field.

I have already created an SAP account and I have joined the beginner corner. I have also read the blog post about the "learning SAP" process and I am excited to start my studies. I am particularly interested in the learning journey for SAP S/4HANA, as I believe that this certification would be valuable for my career.

I am confident that I can successfully complete the digital skills initiative and earn my SAP certification. I am a dedicated learner and I am always willing to put in the extra effort. I am also a quick learner and I am confident that I can master the material in the learning journey.

I am very grateful for the opportunity to participate in this program and I am excited to get started. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely, 

Ahmed Fawzy Omran Abdalla

entry.title: Re: SOAP protocol to Cloud Connector for "Replicate docum...

thank you for your hint. We have tried to use the transaction SICF, but we cannot find there the Endpoint for the Document Flow requests coming from the BTP.

If not here, could it be that the authentication method/criteria are set on SOAMANAGER? Does it suit with the context above?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: To understand the usage and scenario coverage of scop...
entry.content:
@Vishal_Prakash 

Hi Vishal, 

For more information on the 4X8 scope item, you can also have a look at the following docu: Integration with Advanced Bank Statement Automation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/d5b70dead51d431aa5668df2f64fdf47.html?locale=en-US )

For more information on 1MV, I recommend you have a look at the product page of SAP Cash Application: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CASH_APPLICATION?locale=en-US 

I hope, this helps.

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Organizing an SAP Code Jam together with delaware BeLux
entry.content:
Dear Code Jam Team,

As an SAP Partner, we are keen to host a Code Jam event centered around the theme ‘With SAP Build, Create Apps, Processes, and Business Sites Without Coding’. We seek your expertise and support to bring this initiative to life.

Our colleagues in Flanders have previously hosted a Code Jam event that was met with great enthusiasm. Inspired by their success, we aim to replicate this achievement for our French-speaking clients in Wallonia.

We would greatly value your guidance in planning this event and request the involvement of a SAP specialist to lead the Code Jam session.

Our proposed venue is our office in Waver (Belgium - Avenue Fleming), targeting a June 2024 timeframe. We are planning for an intimate gathering, limiting attendance to 20-25 participants, though we are open to scheduling the event sooner if feasible.

We appreciate your consideration and are excited about the prospect of collaborating on a successful Code Jam event!

Best regards,

Timéa du Moulin - timea.dumoulin@delaware.pro

entry.title: CAP JAVA: CDS service with $batch requires authentication
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a CAP JAVA application where I defined a service with public entities and protected entities with requires annotation like this:


I can consume all my public entities without authentication. 
But the $batch request gives a 401 error and requires authentication.
How can I make the $batch public as well with requires annotation?
I tried with spring security config:

This makes the $batch public but then I cannot get the authentication info of logged in users, so 

userInfo.isAuthenticated() is always false (also for logged in users).

What is the best way to solve this?

Best regards and many thanks,

Chris

entry.title: Re: Plateau Report Designer: Choose Font Arial Unicode
entry.content:
Hi there

We are facing the same issue with the font. Did you manage to fix it or to apply the Arial Unicode font in Plateau Report Designer?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: POST Data of ALV Report using BDC for CO11N
entry.content:
• Did you consider using BAPI such as BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP, BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT, BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
  • Else use SHDB on CO11N or CO11 but read first 1999131 - Batch input issues with transactions CO11 and CO11N

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets with Zero NBV not posting depreciation a...
entry.content: Thanks Sumesh. The Depreciation area and key are all engaged. Two years ago we carried out a similar exercise and this all worked. So in 2021 we had an asset which was full depreciated to zero NBV. In Feb 2022 we realised that we were going to use the asset for all of 2022 as well, so we extended the life by another year and this all worked fine. However, when I have on the same exercise this year it doesn’t work. I have tried running AFAB to push it through and AFAR but still no luck.

entry.title: Vitaliy in Town: SAP Stammtisch Zürich 14. März 2024, 18.00 CET
entry.content:
@Vitaliy-R Vitaliy Rudnytskiy, Expert for Data and Analytics & AI/ML, is in Town for the Codejam

Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA in Zürich and Lausanne

so lets have a beer

please let me know if you are coming, so I can book enough tables

you can do this directly on this community Page groups.community.sap.com

please also check out the SAP Stammtisch Community Page: 

Zürich - SAP Community Groups

blogs.sap.com and other former community pages (SCN) will all be moved here, so lets start using the new platform!

entry.title: Re: SOAP protocol to Cloud Connector for "Replicate docum...
entry.content: Not sure. The backend side is not really my area of expertise. Perhaps you can add further tags from the area of the application you are calling? (I.e. the application that is publishing the SOA endpoint.)

entry.title: Re: YTD Salary calculation in data action
entry.content:
@sivapuram_phanikumar 

Thanks for the explanation. The below should do the trick for you  

MEMBERSET [d/GLAccount]="SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/DataSource]="EMP_SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/Date]=BASEMEMBER([d/Date] ,"[2024]" )
DELETE([d/DataSource]="EMP_SALARY_YTD")

FOREACH [d/Date]

DATA([d/DataSource]="EMP_SALARY_YTD")=RESULTLOOKUP([d/DataSource]="EMP_SALARY_YTD",[d/Date]=PREVIOUS(1))+RESULTLOOKUP()

ENDFOR

I have used Activity type for Datasource

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: How to hide a result list column in a value help?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP environment, I am making a value help based on a CDS entity.

The @UI.selectionField: [] annotation works fine, and the filters are rendered in the proper order.

The @UI.LineItem: [ { position: # } ] also works fine where it is maintained, in that the search results are displayed in the correct order.

However, the fields that do not have @UI.LineItem annotation maintained are still displayed in the result list.  They are added to the result list at the end, after all the other fields with a @UI.LineItem annotation. I have tried to maintain @UI.LineItem: [ { hidden: true } ] to these fields, but they are still displayed.

These fields are required in the CDS view entity (they are selection fields) and must not be displayed in the result list. How do I prevent these unwanted result list fields from being displayed?

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Landing Page Favicon
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to add our brand logo to the browser tab (i.e., using favicon) for the landing pages hosted by SAP.  As it's not possible edit the <link> tag of the pages, we're unable to add the logo.  Does anyone have a workaround?  I have raised a support ticket - as I beleive this is something that needs doing on our behalf - but was advised to raise the request within the community. SAP Marketing Cloud 

Thank you in advance!

Regards

Brad

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Version Input Control Not worki...
entry.content:
@rachugh 

Looks like this is a classic story where Version gets hardcoded in Filter section of the charts and cannot be removed. If you switch to Optimized mode of the story you will be able to remove the default version filter from Charts filter section and charts will respond to your input control. So either convert the to Optimized mode ( File Save as ) or create this story in optimized mode.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Work order number and long text operations on the same file
entry.content:
Hi all,

I was looking for a report that would give me the work order number and the whole list of operations of that document.  I hear that such tcode doesn't exist, only through SE16N, and that I would need to join 2 different tables, AUFK table with the AFVC table. I would copy and paste the work order number from AUFK and paste it on AFVC table. Unfortunately, I didn't see the work order field when I was setting up the AFVC. Does anyone know if this is the correct path or should I take a different approach?

entry.title: Re: fb02-Assignment field (BSEG-ZUONR) field length will...
entry.content: Read User Exits in Validations/Substitutions/Rules to add some simple Abap code to the validation rule.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Proxy retrieve PDF from CPI and have it printed locally
entry.content:
Hi Stephen,

We have recently encountered issues with printing interactive forms received from third-parties. When we preview or print them via Adobe, everything works as expected. However, when we send the PDF directly to the spool and print it, we encounter empty prints.

Do you know if the function module mentioned in your blog is designed for interactive forms? Or is there a better approach available?

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Plateau Report Designer: Choose Font Arial Unicode
entry.content: I just found the solution, it was easy actually. You only need first to download the font Arial Unicode to your computer...it will show up on PRD

entry.title: Re: Dimension Hierarchy Drilldown
entry.content:
@bautayakool 

Can you show how your NCP Accounts is set up. I see no problem in drilling down even if its 1 level only

My Account setup

Also select the NCP Account and check what is the drill state for it in table option

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Asset does not exist
entry.content:
Hey thanks for your help but online I can't find much about BAPI_CONVERSION_EXT2INT1 and on the support page also finds what helps me so I tried to delete the whole thing like this

 

$ItemAnlage = 31745
$ItemAnlage = "0000000" + $ItemAnlage

$destination = Get-Destination

[SAP.Middleware.Connector.IRfcFunction]$bapiChangeAsset = $destination.Repository.CreateFunction("BAPI_FIXEDASSET_GETDETAIL")

$bapiChangeAsset.SetValue("COMPANYCODE", "0001")
$bapiChangeAsset.SetValue("ASSET", $ItemAnlage)
$bapiChangeAsset.SetValue("SUBNUMBER", "0")

$bapiChangeAsset.Invoke($destination)

 

Unfortunately this did not work and now it tells me that the attachment 000000031745 does not exist

entry.title: Re: SAP Identity Management 8.0 Video – Basic Synchronization
entry.content:
Hi, 

Video is not available.
Could you please check.

Best Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Re: AP detail reports
entry.content:
Program/Transaction starting with Z or Y are custom program defined in your systems

Else

  • Contracts are in EKKO (EKPO, etc.) where document category is K
  • Purchase order (released contract) are in the same table where document category is F (EKKO-KONNR to join)
  • Invoices are in RBKP (RSEG, etc.) contain PO information and are linked to FI document BKPF (BSEG, etc.) thru BKPF-AWTYP (RBKP) and AWKEY reference
  • Payment can be found thru Clearing document (BSEG/BSIK-AUGBL, etc.)
  • etc.

What did you already code and where are you stuck?

entry.title: Re: How to Copy Bank Statement Data from Excel to SAP S/4HANA Using the Manage Bank Statement App
entry.content:
Hi kevin_hu,

 

the functionality works the same way, if it is enabled yes. To answer already maybe the next question which comes up, is it enabled in other apps? Basically the answer is (who would have guessed it): it depends on which app.

So if the app was developed using the "Fiori Elements" framework, then yes. If the app was developed freestyle as a SAPUI5 app, then it depends on what the developers have decided to enable or not enable.

 

You can find this out in the fiori apps library. For instance lets look at the Manage Bank Statements app (F1564): https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1564')/S28OP

It states "Application Type Transactional (SAP Fiori elements)" 

 

If you check now the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app, you see that is has been developed freestyle "Application Type Transactional (SAP Fiori (SAPUI5))" :

 

That said it does not mean as soon as an application has been developed freestyle as SAPUI5 app, that it does not support it. It depends on how the developers have developed the app and if they enabled the smart tables for it. In this applicationReprocess Bank Statement Items for instance, we do not have the possibility to "create" bank statement line items, so the analytical table on the app does not provide any copy and paste functionality, right.

So you have to test it out app by app, but the functionality works similar as here if the app has enabled it. Which means the columns are pasted exactly in that order as copied from the excel.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Hello Ryoichi,

you mean in the context of S/4HANA for public sector ? 

This is not included in the FAA and AFAIK there is also no image in the CAL for it as of today.

Since you are an SAP employee, please contact me via email and I can give you further contacts for discussing it.

Best, Joerg

entry.title: Opportunity Access restrictions based on Product Category
entry.content:
We need to apply access restrictions based on product categories for opportunities using a business role, we can only find Sales territory, sales org, employees etc.

E,g, A product category to which the user(or manually selected in the business role) has access is added to an opportunity, the same opportunity should be visible for him.

Please let us know if this is possible. C4C Sales

is it possible? Perhaps with data action or script?

Its not a mandatory field in "Create Maintenance Request". But its mandatory while accepting this request within "Screen Maintenance Reqeust". I also dont find any possibility to make default value for priority.
So everytime the Creator of the Request doesnt fill in the priority - the screener has to do this?

Is this the idea?

entry.title: Re: Move SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact/app content through SAP Cloud Transport Management

I am wondering if there is a possibility to configure and deploy flows automatically in the destination tenant. As I understand now the flows arriving not deployed, correct?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Currency Calculation incorrect - Why?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I've been working with SAP Datasphere for almost 1 year now, but did not use currency conversion so far.

This is my first try, but somehow the result is not like expected and I hope to find experts here, to explain why this is...

I used the two SAP Help pages for my example:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/b462239ffb644d9baab4442a10a72edf.html 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/6e3d8bed7ece4c27ba10e2cc523915fe.html 

I'm sorry for all the German column names - my example was not intended to become a community question!

I created one simple source table with Date, Value in Local Currency (USD) and Target Currency (EUR):

My conversion is executed via a graphical view and a calculated currency conversion column:

This view is contained in a dataflow, where I then fill the calculated column into my 2nd local table column:

So far so good ... but when you compare the "Wert in SW" which is the converted statistics currency, then I cannot find the right TCURR values for this calculation 😞

See here the source from my S4 system, and the loaded remote table data in my Datasphere Space:

I have only 1 set of TCUR* tables in the whole Datasphere tenant... so there is no other table containing different values.

Does anybody see in the above shown settings, how these strange values are caluclated?

When you convert USD in EUR and with the rate of Jan 9th 2023, this was: 1/ 1,07213 = 0,9327, almost what you can find via google:

So, this means, my 100 USD should be worth 93,27 EUR... but Datasphere converted: 106,40 EUR.

It does not seem like a technical error, since I chose "Set to null" in case of errors.

Any idea from the experts here?

Did anybody test this already, did you have similar issues in the beginning?

Any help appreciated 🙂

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: technical field name ROBUKRS
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to upload data to group reporting from a flat file that includes the company code. I have downloaded the latest flexible upload template (v6) from note 2659672 which includes this information on additional fields:

So I added a new column with CompanyCode in row 7 and ROBUKRS in row 8 and filled in some sample date.

When I try to upload this file I get a log header message

Can anyone help me with the correct field name since it seems to differ from what is listed in the template.

entry.title: Re: ByDesign Accounting Periods, Fiscal Year Closure and Common Error Messages
entry.content:
Hi Alexandre, 

I have successfully used the "Partially Blocked" status for supplier invoice and closing step "Operational Posting - therefore the system (correctly) created the source documents WITHOUT posting the supplier invoices. However as of Feb 24, this functionality seems to have changed - as in the supplier invoices get posted even with a partial block -  and no exception is created.

Do you know what is the meaning of having a "Partial block" if it's only providing a warning with no block as such?

Regards,
Sebastian Palade

entry.content:

Christian

entry.title: Re: Asset does not exist
entry.content: Subnumber is a character field of length 4, try to replace "0" with "0000".

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - How to refresh the list of childrens after...
entry.content:
Thank you Paolo,

the approach with annotations worked for me:

 

<edmx:DataServices>
    <Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local">
        <Annotations Target="SAP__self.createChangeRequest(SAP__self.UserType)">
            <Annotation Term="Common.SideEffects">
                <Record Type="Common.SideEffectsType">
                    <PropertyValue Property="TargetEntities">
                        <Collection>
                            <NavigationPropertyPath>_it/_ChangeRequest</NavigationPropertyPath>
                        </Collection>
                    </PropertyValue>
                    <PropertyValue Property="TargetProperties">
                        <Collection>
                            <String>_it/_ChangeRequest/__EntityControl</String>
                        </Collection>
                    </PropertyValue>
                </Record>
            </Annotation>
        </Annotations>
    </Schema>
</edmx:DataServices>

 

Thank you very much.

Best,
Christian

entry.title: Freigth Unit Time Conflict Execution Block Inbound Scenario
entry.content:
Hello,

We're on SAP S/4HANA Basic TM 1909. We notice different behavior in changing Freight Order Stage Date and Times. Anyone aware of this, and how to solve this?

Outbound Scenario: Works as expected.

Step 1) Outbound Delivery creates Freight Unit. Manually planned into a Freight Order
Step 2) Change Planned Arrival Date on Freight Order
Step 3) System sets an Execution Block, but removes the Execution Block as well.
Step 4) System updates all Freight Unit Dates and times and Outbound Delivery Delivery Date is updated. Everything in sync.

Inbound Scenario: Time Conflict remains.

Step 1) Inbound Delivery creates Freight Unit. Manually planned into a Freight Order
Step 2) Change Planned Arrival Date on Freight Order to 08-10 (instead of 08-09)
Step 3) System sets an Execution Block
Step 4) System updates Freight Unit Unloading Data and Time only but Inbound Delivery Date and Time is not updated. ID-FU-FO not in sync. See screen shot of Freight Unit Time window Inbound Stage at Shipping Point.

SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: Migrating AFO reports to SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

This blog states that it is possible to save AFO reports in SAC. I have a question about this and hope for your help.

If I no longer have the BI-platform license, how can I use the saved AFO reports in SAC? should the existing reports be redeveloped in SAC, add-in for MS Excel?

br. 

Thami

entry.title: RAP: Behavior definition for abstract entity
entry.content:
Hi experts,

A bit of interesting requirement from my side. I was tasked to develop and expose an OData API that calls a few BAPIs to create a few objects in the S4 backend (e.g. sales orders) together with quite a few lines of custom code. Now this would be a trivial task to do in RAP, however the caveat is - that there is no DB layer for custom data - API should literally just accept the data, execute BAPIs and return the BAPI result back to the consumer. 

Since the behavior definition is not allowed for abstract entities, do you have an idea on how this requirement can be realized in a gateway-like style, where I can just define a model for consumer to use, consumer then calls the endpoint with the necessary payload and I take over with behavior definition to execute necessary code?

Thank you,

Ilja.

https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/learn.html

Once completed you will have access.

Michael.

entry.title: Re: With the 'people.sap.com' getting deprecated will the Bookmarks get affected.

entry.title: What is new for SAP Build Work Zone? Product Highlights in January and February 2024
entry.content:
Welcome to my first product update of the year 2024. This blog post will provide you with the product news and highlights for SAP Build Work Zone in January and February 2024. 

You might know what SAP Build Work Zone is? If not, here is a short introduction: SAP Build Work Zone empowers IT professionals and line of business experts to easily build and design engaging business sites for employees, partners and customers with intuitive drag-and-drop functionality. It connects to all systems (SAP a non-SAP) by creating a single access point to applications, processes, information and data on any device,from desktop or mobile, and it maximize team productivity by enabling guided experiences and knowledge sharing.
SAP Build Work Zone is coming with two editions: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition. The latest addition to the SAP Build Work Zone family is SAP Start, which became generally available in July 2023. If you have more questions on SAP Build Work Zone, visit our FAQ page on SAP Community.

Roadmap Updates

We recently updated the roadmap for SAP Build Work Zone standard and advanced edition. You can find updated information for Q1, Q2 and Q3 2024:

Note that the information on the roadmap can be subject to change at any time, check out the Roadmap Explorer for the latest information.

Administration Experience

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

Translation in the new site experience with pages and spaces:
The translation capabilities are now available in the productive systems: Content managers can enable end users to view their sites in selected language, and they can support the translation of spaces and pages:

Role Assignments by usage of Identity Provisioning
For role assignments, there is now an alternative option that we recommend: using the identity provisioning part of SAP Cloud Identity services, instead of creating role collections:

This new capability allows to provision the user role mapping from a source system - such as as SAP S/4HANA - directly into the Work Zone stack via an dedicated API. Note that this new role assignment option is available across all Work Zone editions as well as for SAP Successfactors Work Zone. 
There is a new Admin UI that allows the administrator to analyze the roles that were assigned to a specific user and provisioned by the Identity Provisioning service of SAP Cloud Identity Services.

Support of new common Super Domain workzone.cloud.sap
The new workzone.cloud.sap common super domain is now supported to bring applications under one aligned domain name. Administrators can configure the workzone.cloud.sap common super domain for exposing a site instead of using the default ondemand.com domain. In the first step this features is only available for the standard edition, the introduction of super domain is planned for the advanced edition in upcoming releases.

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

New Wizard Layout in Workspaces
This feature is now also available in productive systems (in Q4 2023 it was only available in the preview systems). Workspace administrators can create wizard-like predefined processes, to help users complete complex business flows. The wizards can include multiple stages and steps, and cards and widgets can be added to them.
By providing a flexible framework for defining process steps and by enabling content managers to create and configure UI card-based, interactive experiences, business users can be guided through a wizard-like predefined process:

Public Workspaces: Access Levels for Non-Members
A non-member visibility is now available for workspaces to give non-members access to the workspace content. Workspace admins have the choice: (1) to give non-members the same collaboration settings as members or (2) to use a new read-only mode for non-members. This will hide the different membership & collaboration related features for the non-members across the workspace and its content. Workspace administrators can define specific users lists and users who can access the workspace as non-members. This is only available for public workspace as a first step.

Public Workspace: Role-Based Access for Non-Members 
Company administrators can define role-based access to workspaces for non-members. Workspace admins, who are not company admins, can view the settings but cannot modify them. To set this option, you go to the Participation tab of the workspace settings, then go to the Non-Member Settings section, and in the Access Policy options you choose Specific roles. 

Integration with Notification Service and Task Center
Site administrators can choose whether to use the default notification mechanism available in their site, or to enable the integration with the central notification service of SAP BTP, and show notifications from multiple notification providers. One of the supported notification providers is now also SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition. 

Note that - as part of this change - some notifications will be migrated to the Task Center. On the Help Portal you will learn about notifications that were previously visible in the notifications area of a site and are now moved to SAP Task Center. 

With the support of dynamic KPI tiles, you can now see Task Center information on tiles in this way:

Business User Experience

SAP Companion Content - Expanded Support (only relevant for the advanced edition)
SAP Companion provides on-screen help for end users. Activating this capability enables end users to view help content, that is specific to the screen. Additional integration content is now added out of the box, provides on-screen help, documentation & selected guided tours.

Developer Experience

We are happy to announce a Central GitHub repository for SAP Build Work Zone providing templates for SAP Build Work Zone code samples as a starting point for developers:

For the standard edition the repository contains content package samples providing information about how to create custom content for SAP Start and SAP Build Work Zone Standard (new site experience). UI Integration Cards and the corresponding CDM (Common Data Model) descriptions are covered within this samples. For the advanced edition the repository contains code samples for these two main areas: Content Package template code samples and Guide Experience (Wizard) code samples.

Deploying a SAP Build App project with backend to SAP Build Work Zone
For applications that include a backend project in visual cloud functions, we have now introduced a simplified method for integrating with SAP Build Work Zone. For more information and instructions, check out the blog post What's New for SAP Build Apps - Enhanced Fusion Development.

What is Coming Next?

I would like make you aware of some upcoming new innovations for SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition. A new workspace creation dialog is planned as well as the removal of external workspace as a separate workspace type combined with a consistent experience between private and public workspaces. The access control concepts will be expanded, and external users can access public and private workspaces both as members and non-members.
The full feature set supporting this innovation is planned to become available in the preview systems in March 21, stay tuned for further information. You can find more details already now in the What's New Viewer, see also this blog post explaining some of the new concepts.

More Information on new Features and Functions

  • Check out the roadmap for standard & advanced edition.
  • You can find more information in the What is new Viewer for standard edition and advanced edition.
  • The availability date of the new features on the preview systems and the information about how to use them can be found in the What's New on Preview Systems.

Learn more

SAP Build Work Zone on: sap.com / SAP Community
Discovery Center missions: standard / advanced edition
SAP Build Work Zone on SAP PartnerEdge

Follow SAP Build on Social Media and Join the SAP Builders Group

  • Twitter (hashtag #SAPBuild)
  • LinkedIn

Join also the SAP Builders group and engage with a community of peers to unleash innovation by building apps, process automations, and creating business sites.

Regards

entry.title: I_PurchaseRequisitionTP Multiple Items in One Purchase Requistion
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using are Public Edition Business Object Interfaces I_PurchaseRequisitionTP to create Purchase Requisition with more than one item.

If requisition don't have any warning, it creates one purchase requisition correctly.

If there are warnings, the following pop-up appears and requisition is not created, but number range is consumed.

entry.title: Re: POST Data of ALV Report using BDC for CO11N

entry.title: Re: Asset does not exist
entry.content:
Small sample in Abap for conversion BAPI external format to internal format

 

  MOVE 'BUS1022' TO CONVERSION_LS-OBJTYPE.
  MOVE 'GETDETAIL' TO CONVERSION_LS-METHOD.

  MOVE 'ASSET' TO CONVERSION_LS-PARAMETER.
  MOVE '1234' TO CONVERSION_LS-EXT_FORMAT.
  APPEND CONVERSION_LS TO CONVERSION_LT.

  MOVE 'SUBNUMBER' TO CONVERSION_LS-PARAMETER.
  MOVE '0' TO CONVERSION_LS-EXT_FORMAT.
  APPEND CONVERSION_LS TO CONVERSION_LT.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_CONVERSION_EXT2INT1'
    DESTINATION LV_BACKEND
    TABLES
      DATA   = CONVERSION_LT
      RETURN = RETURN.

    LOOP AT CONVERSION_LT INTO CONVERSION_LS.
      MOVE CONVERSION_LS-INT_FORMAT TO <INTVALUE>. " 000000001234 and 0000
      MOVE CONVERSION_LS-CONV_LEN TO <LENGTH>. " 012 et 004
    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: UNV to UNX Conversion guide: A step-by-step approach
entry.content:
Introduction

As you may have already read in my post, UNV is dead, long live UNX, I made the point that SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025, the next major version scheduled for Q4 2024, will not include the Universe Design Tool (UDT), and no longer support UNV universes, by which time all UNV universes must be converted to UNX universes. 

In this article, I also explained the “Change Source” feature in Web Intelligence, particularly in larger deployments, with hundreds of thousands of documents. I mentioned that an SAP partner solution could ease this process. I then spoke to our long term partner, Wiiisdom, who offers a solution to meet this conversion need. The Wiiisdom team has provided the steps on how they can help with a conversion project from A to Z.

 

1. Preparing for conversion with 360Suite for SAP BusinessObjects

With audit and metadata analysis capabilities and the dozens of prebuilt Web Intelligence reports, it is possible to gather all the details needed to conduct a thorough assessment that will help evaluate the size and scope of the project. Information about universes and documents can be used to understand what is used (or not used), and which documents have been duplicated (even if they have different names or are saved in distinct locations). 

 

1 - Report on document usage

2 - Report on unused universe objects

The insights provided by 360Suite will help in planning and prioritizing the efforts for the conversion and repointing project. Unused universes and reports can be excluded from the conversion process and the remaining ones can be prioritized, but there will still probably be a substantial number of universes and reports to work with. Again, 360Suite helps with the next steps.

 

2. Converting your UNV to UNX in just a few clicks 

Creating UNX versions of the UNV universes with 360Suite is a child’s play. The “Convert UNV Universe to UNX Universe” option can be used to retrieve all UNV universes, which can then be converted in bulk at the click of a button.

3 - UNV to UNX conversion

Once the Universes have been converted, the process of ‘repointing’ existing Web Intelligence documents that previously referenced the UNV universe to the corresponding UNX version can begin.

3. Updating/Repointing Web Intelligence Documents to the new UNX 

360Suite provides two different options for repointing Web Intelligence documents:

  • A simple folder-based approach where Web Intelligence documents are grouped into a folder and the conversion is executed for every document in the folder (note that multiple folders could be processed)
  • A more comprehensive repointing approach allowing this remapping to be done at the data provider level (allowing for the possibility that some documents may reference more than one universe)

    Document-level Repointing

    In this approach, a file (in Excel format) that lists one or more Folders, is used to drive the conversion process such that every single document contained in the folder will be repointed from the old universe to the new universe as defined when setting up the task itself.  

    The Excel file used to drive the process has a single column where the ID of the folder that contains the Web Intelligence reports to be remapped is used as reference to drive the conversion.

     

    Detailed Data Provider Repointing 

    Additional repointing capabilities can be found within the detailed Web Intelligence repointing option. In this instance, the process can cater for the fact that there can be multiple universes and/or data providers used in the Web Intelligence document. 

    360Suite allows you to generate the information needed to support this process with a set of tasks that can output key object information into a file that can that be edited to perform update operations in bulk.

    When the tasks are complete, a log is created with details of the steps of the repointing process. 

     4 - Log file Example 

 

4. Testing & Validation 

Once the repointing process is complete, you will need to make sure that the reports are behaving in the same way as they did when using the UNV universe.

360Suite provides a side-by-side comparison of documents together with a comprehensive analysis of all the features that make up a report to be able to display any differences between them. By collecting all the metadata of the two reports being compared, 360Suite enables testing to be conducted across the following report attributes:

  • Compare Data values between the documents.
  • Compare Numeric Values and formats.
  • Compare the Style and Structure of the document.
  • Compare Images, charts etc.

    Where the reports being compared are identical then they will be flagged as ‘Matching,’ and no further action will be required. In a situation where there are any differences in the reports then this will be flagged as a ‘Nonmatching’ necessitating further investigation. Of course, with these tests already in place, reports updates to fix any discrepancies can immediately be tested using the same test cases set up previously.

    As can be seen in the cross tab below, all mismatching data values are highlighted.

    5 - Testing Results - Mismatched data

     

    6 - Data discrepancies in Charts

     

    Once all the appropriate corrections to the documents have been made, final validation of the tested reports will result in testing results indicating that all documents are now shown as Matching. Documentation is available in Excel format to detail the testing results allowing for easy business sign-off.

    Now you have seen how to convert your UNV universes to UNX  universes successfully using the 360Suite solutions from the initial universe analysis to bulk conversion and repointing to the final validation. 

     

    We want to hear from you

    The SAP BusinessObjects BI suite remains a key component of our Analytics strategy and we are committed to our customers. If you have any questions or feedback, please write to sapaskanalytics@sap.com for more information.

entry.title: Re: Pick datetime Bugs

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements アノテーションが反映されない
entry.content: データ型、桁数等はバックエンドで定義するものであり、ローカルアノテーションでは指定できないのではないでしょうか。

entry.title: SAP HXM Indonesia Localization Virtual Session
entry.content:
Register now for SAP HXM Indonesia Localization Virtual Session 2024.

Being mindful of the changes in legislation is the first step to succeed in a constantly changing business environment.

Join us on March 20 for the 2024 edition of the HXM Localization Virtual Session, where we will share updates on the latest legal changes applicable for Indonesia and provide you with comprehensive overview of the various SAP delivered localization functions.You will gain valuable insights into SAP localization solutions that can help you accelerate your digital business transformation at a global level.

Agenda – Indonesia (GMT+7) | 9:30 am – 10:30 am

9:30am - SAP Payroll Indonesia Legal Compliance Update
10:25am - Q&A

Note: The presentation will take lead in English.

Register here

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional integration between SAP SuccessFactors & Azure Active Directory in Microsoft Azure
entry.content:
Hi @Laura_Gyselbrec 

in SF you can remove the setting for the country code to be mandatory in Manage Business Configuration in the Phone Information.

However we recommend to deactivate the fields for Country Code and Extension completely, as Azure is storing the Phone Number as a whole in one field and it is therefore also send alltogether into the number field of SF anyways. 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: SAP CAP Attachment Handling
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on attachments handling in CAP. i can able to upload and download the files from UI in view.xml using UploadSet controll.

My scenario is changed now. I have to attach a file from my webapp folder for uploading in controller level without using view.xml

I tried setting the url of the file location like below

this.byId("uploadset").setUploadUrl("path of the fille from webapp folder")

this.byId("uploadset").setUrl("path of the fille from webapp folder")

All other fields like filename, mediatype are updating in db except my content.

I have seen my network tab where my file is not found 404 error.

How to attach a file for upload in controller level.

Please help.

 

Thanks,

Gowtham
